flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Joaquin Valley College-Visalia rose 62% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.7k → $10.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Joaquin Valley College-Visalia rose 28% between 2010 and 2013 ($12.9k → $16.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at San Joaquin Valley College-Visalia vs the 2018–2022 baseline (33.9% vs 40.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Joaquin Valley College-Visalia fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).
